tagline: Planning layer for the @trembus roblox-ts package platform.
sub: Wraps roblox-packages-mono via external-locations. Code lives in the repo; plans live here.
axis: 1 CONTRACT → 7 KINDS → VALIDATOR · SCAFFOLDER · GUARD → DERIVED DASHBOARD
sourceLine: source-of-truth: schema/project-entity.base.schema.json + roblox-development-studio's validated _project/ entities · generated by tools/render-hub.mjs
strategy: One contract, three primitives, many disposable renderers — the planning layer reduced the way a UI reduces to State and Relation.

domains.name: ProjectEntity
domains.note: One non-optional contract every _project/ file derives from — Identity (kind·id·title) · State (status·updated) · Relation (links). kind & id are loader-derived from the path; the authored surface is just title/status/updated (+links/tags). The validator, scaffolder, guard, and this dashboard all read this single source.

domains.name: Packages
domains.note: 18 package entities — status over the per-kind enum (14 active · 3 incubating · 1 proposed). 4 typed links touch this kind.

domains.name: Decision log
domains.note: 10 decision entities — status over the per-kind enum (all accepted). 19 typed links touch this kind.

domains.name: Pipeline log
domains.note: 4 pipeline entities — status over the per-kind enum (3 build · 1 design). 8 typed links touch this kind.

domains.name: Workflow log
domains.note: 3 workflow entities — status over the per-kind enum (2 active · 1 draft). 5 typed links touch this kind.

domains.name: Field Guide
domains.note: A self-serve map of how this planning system is structured and named: the framework anatomy (schema/ · lib/ · tools/ · the two hooks · the vendored core), the three primitives, and the relation vocabulary — plus, derived live from this project's config, one folder per entity kind with its filename scheme, status enum, and conventional sections. Open the Field Guide tab for the full expandable tree.

entries.desc: kind "decision" · serial · 4-digit · status: proposed · accepted · superseded · rejected
kind "pipeline" · slug · status: design · qualify · build · ship · archive · shelved
kind "roadmap" · slug · status: proposed · active · superseded · complete
kind "session" · date-slug · <date>-<slug> · status: planned · active · blocked · completed · shelved
kind "workflow" · slug · status: draft · active · deprecated
kind "package" · slug · status: proposed · incubating · active · superseded · retired
the universal contract + the config meta-schema
the md parser + the contract seam (loadContract)

domains.name: Commands
domains.note: The project's slash commands (.claude/commands/) — the unified /new <kind> scaffolder + friends. Each writes valid frontmatter and self-validates. The syntax + a one-line gloss of every command is listed here.

entries.desc: End-of-session sweep — drift check, knowledge-capture opportunities, and a conflict audit across instructions · memory · skills
Scaffold a new _project/ entity of any kind your project-system.config.json declares
Session wake-up — dangling-session triage, one-shot orientation brief, and an engram-style session open
